themes.exampleQuote: Not just your normal sugary affair but elevated with unique flavor and texture.
awesome baked goods but really needs a quality/service check on coffee
Amazing stop for a date night or after dinner.
The lines are long and do not move.
Gluten and nut free options are 🔥
The young woman working the register seemed well-intentioned but clueless.

sentiment_summary: Reviewers rave about the inventive, high-quality baked goods and the warm, date-worthy atmosphere, but repeatedly flag inconsistent coffee execution and frustratingly slow service as the cafe's weak spots.
notable_quote: You can tell a lot of time and love went into crafting those recipes. They should be proud.
